raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-declaration modeling mindfulness and boundary-setting through repetitive, mantra-like phrasing",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "self-disconnection occurs via attempts to please others",
    "breath awareness is an effective anchor during difficulty",
    "pausing enables choice between self-connection and external pleasing",
    "self-connection can function as a primary, actionable commitment"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; each line elaborates the same priority without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "reader treats lines as personal reminders or meditative prompts rather than literal propositions, and finds value in iterative self-reminding for emotional regulation",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "reader extracts prescriptive behavioral rules or ontological claims about selfhood from what is framed as evocative language"
}
